Imbued Teir`Dal Chain Leggings  
 


Slot: LEGS
AC: 8
WIS: +3 INT: +3 AGI: +2
SV MAGIC: +4
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR SHD BRD ROG NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: DEF HEF
Deity: Innoruuk
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Imbued Teir`Dal Chain Leggings

Slot: LEGS
AC: 8
WIS: +3 INT: +3 AGI: +2
SV MAGIC: +4
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR SHD BRD ROG NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: DEF HEF
Deity: Innoruuk
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Imbued Inno Chain Leggings
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):60, 0, 10
Light:Paw of Opalla
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:27 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:287
Lucy Entry By:Sparkz
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 07:27:51
Page Updated:Wed Feb 21st, 2018

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 1,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 1
[Comments ]

Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Imbued Teir`Dal Chain Leggings (Dark Elf) (Smithing, 180 trivial)
    • Class: ALL
    Expansion: Scars of Velious
    Yield: 1 x Imbued Teir`Dal Chain Leggings


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
whats ingredients
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 1:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791169316
200 posts
just what the title asks and where can you get the spell to imbue the materials needed and who can use the spell

my wizard is solro follower has the imbue fireopal spell and has his rings i have yet to see anything that a SK can use to imbue with

i have heard of troll shamans getting an imbue spell enlighten me on this
▲ Page top
RE: whats ingredients
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2002 at 5:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1599437907616
View User Forum
23 posts
Actually, Troll shamen can use this spell, as well, though I'm not sure if it's sold in the shaman guild in Grobb. However, it is definitely sold in the Neriak cleric guild.

▲ Page top
RE: whats ingredients
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 2:04 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245548959
Scholar
286 posts
Imbue Sapphire is a level 29 Cleric spell, sold in the Cleric's Guild in Neriak 3rd Gate. It's restricted to Innoruuk Clerics only, and requires a Sapphire as a reagent.
▲ Page top
does it switch???
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763732027
8 posts


Ok lts say i do end up making these legs (wich i plan on making the plate mail because it is awsome) i do worship innoruk and and so i make them but then i give them to someone that doesent worship innoruk they cant where them because i worship innoruk can i ever make these leggings without the special diety stats???




▲ Page top
RE: does it switch???
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2002 at 4:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249265948
57 posts
Actually, you can make a version that is really close to this, you will lose a couple stats altough I am not sure right of the top off my head which ones. To find out look up "Enchanted Tier Dal Leggings" This is a whole suit of armor you can make that is very similar to Imbued, but you do not have to be a disciple of Inny to wear.

My enchanter buddy has the Enchanted and I have the imbued. I have been kicking back in the Bazaar looking for legs and arms to replace the ones on my mage. there doesnt seem to better up for sale for less then 3-5K

Happy smithing

Volcanus Eruptus
55 DE Mage
Vallon Zek

P.S. I look forward to the suggestions for better gear that I anticipate will follow this post, just keep the FLaming to a minimum please.
▲ Page top
RE: does it switch???
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 11:02 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757592958
73 posts
You have to worship Innoruuk to wear/make. Which means it is for Dark Elf/half elf's who worship Innoruuk
▲ Page top
RE: does it switch???
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2001 at 6:31 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245548959
Scholar
286 posts
Not quite. You have to worship Innoruuk to wear them, but not to make them.

QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 5:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760773724
3 posts
This item is crafted by players.
Made by Dark Elf Smiths
Was writtin on the top.. yet people still wonder where u get it. Heh.
They are not that common, u need really high (160+) skill to have success imbuing enchanted ringmail with innoruk.
▲ Page top
RE: can't you people read?
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 6:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246460789
View User Forum
513 posts
Actually... if you want to have better than a 10% chance of making it, you need a smithing skill of above 200 to make Imbued Cultural armour.
▲ Page top
RE: can't you people read?
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 2:06 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245548959
Scholar
286 posts
Actually, try 242 plus. Imbued-Enchanted armor is the absolute bear of the smithing world, max out fine plate first. 42 points to go...

Half elfs?!
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 6:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175343444
View User Forum
246 posts
How is it that Half elves can use this? It's an Innoruk diety item, and no half elf I've used or seen has been able to worship Innoruk.
▲ Page top
RE: Half elfs?!
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750246078
Scholar
312 posts
Um, Half Elf Warriors are the only Halfies that can worship Innoruuk. I WISH halfy bards could worship Innoruuk, but alas, Innoruuk is the ONLY god Bards cannot worship.

To tell the truth, If I were a Half Elf that was in the service of Innoruuk, I'd go for the Imbued Tier`Dal Plate. That stuff is Awesome...
▲ Page top
RE: Half elfs?!
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 4:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763355070
3 posts
These does not only exist in the imbued version, enchanted an normal do not have the deity restriction.
So Half Elves can wear them. But of course the stats are lower.
▲ Page top
RE: Half elfs?!
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 7:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249606794
75 posts
I believe halfelf bards have a wide choice of religion, Innoruuk being one of them
